text:
An “expressway” is a portion of highway that is part of either of the following:

(a) An expressway system established by a county under Section 941.4 of the Streets and Highways Code.

(b) An expressway system established by a county before January 1, 1989, as described in subdivision (g) of Section 941.4 of the Streets and Highways Code.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 314

An “expressway” is a portion of highway that is part of either of the following:

(a) An expressway system established by a county under Section 941.4 of the Streets and Highways Code.

(b) An expressway system established by a county before January 1, 1989, as described in subdivision (g) of Section 941.4 of the Streets and Highways Code.

*(Added by Stats. 2004, Ch. 615, Sec. 17. Effective January 1, 2005.)*

subsections.text: An “expressway” is a portion of highway that is part of either of the following:

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: An expressway system established by a county under Section 941.4 of the Streets and Highways Code.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An expressway system established by a county before January 1, 1989, as described in subdivision (g) of Section 941.4 of the Streets and Highways Code.
